THIS PRIVACY POLICY EXPLAINS WHAT INFORMATION ABOUT YOU IS COLLECTED, HOW THIS IS DONE, WHAT IS IT USED FOR, AND TO WHOM AVATAR MAKER (DEVELOPER NAME) DISCLOSES THIS INFORMATION AND UNDER WHAT CIRCUMSTANCES. Please take a moment with our privacy practices and let us know if you have any questions.

PERSONAL INFORMATION Personal information is data that can be used to uniquely identify or contact a single person. We DO NOT collect , store or use any personal information while you visit, download or upgrade our website or our products, excepting the personal information that you submit to us when you create a user account, send an error report, contact us by e-mail or participate in online surveys and other activities.
